description: End-to-end pubspec.lock -> OSV path. http@0.13.2 is in the affected range (<0.13.3) of GHSA-4rgh-jx4f-qfcq (header injection), so the offline pub OSV index emits one osv-advisory finding. meta@1.8.0 is a benign control with no advisory in the index. Source: vulnerabilities/osv/pub/GHSA-4rgh-jx4f-qfcq.json.
